codex.description: Install Rust Token Killer for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Installs RTK and initializes the global Codex integration.
defaultPrompt: Use the rtk-install skill to install RTK for Codex on this machine, run the global Codex init step `rtk init -g --codex`, and verify it with `rtk init -g --codex --show`.

claude.description: Install Rust Token Killer for Claude Code.

interface.longDescription: Installs RTK and initializes the global Claude Code integration.
defaultPrompt: Use the rtk-install skill to install RTK for Claude Code on this machine, run the global init step `rtk init -g`, and verify that `~/.claude/RTK.md` was created.
